title: Pan-Seared Australian Tenderloin with Collard Greens
description: A flavorful and tender Australian tenderloin served with sautéed collard greens. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: Salad oil
ingredients.notes: such as olive or avocado oil

instructions: Season the tenderloin with salt and pepper.
Heat the salad oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the tenderloin for 1-2 minutes per side, then transfer to the oven.
Cook the tenderloin in the oven for 8-12 minutes, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
While the tenderloin is cooking, heat a separate skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped collard greens and cook until wilted, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Season the collard greens with salt and pepper to taste.
Slice the cooked tenderloin and serve with the sautéed collard greens.
